name: snappy_performance
description: Tighten animations and reduce delays for a snappier, more responsive chat UI on modern iPhones

replacements.find:
static let instant: Double = 0.1
    static let fast: Double = 0.2
    static let medium: Double = 0.3
    static let slow: Double = 0.5
    static let slower: Double = 0.8
    static let messageAppear: Double = 0.35
replacements.replace:
static let instant: Double = 0.05
    static let fast: Double = 0.12
    static let medium: Double = 0.18
    static let slow: Double = 0.3
    static let slower: Double = 0.5
    static let messageAppear: Double = 0.2

replacements.find:
static let snappy: Animation = .spring(
        response: 0.3,
        dampingFraction: 0.7,
        blendDuration: 0
    )
replacements.replace:
static let snappy: Animation = .spring(
        response: 0.2,
        dampingFraction: 0.85,
        blendDuration: 0
    )

replacements.find:
static let gentle: Animation = .spring(
        response: 0.5,
        dampingFraction: 0.8,
        blendDuration: 0.1
    )
replacements.replace:
static let gentle: Animation = .spring(
        response: 0.3,
        dampingFraction: 0.85,
        blendDuration: 0
    )

replacements.find:
static let bouncy: Animation = .spring(
        response: 0.4,
        dampingFraction: 0.6,
        blendDuration: 0
    )
replacements.replace:
static let bouncy: Animation = .spring(
        response: 0.25,
        dampingFraction: 0.7,
        blendDuration: 0
    )
